{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "e_eq_zero_of_lt"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open scoped Polynomial
open MvPolynomial Finset

namespace AlgebraicCombinatorics
namespace SymmetricPolynomials

variable {K : Type*} [CommRing K] {N : ℕ}

theorem e_eq_zero_of_lt (n : ℕ) (h : Fintype.card (Fin N) < n) : e (K := K) (N := N) n = 0 := by
  rw [e_eq_sum_prod_subsets]
  have hcard : Fintype.card (Fin N) < n := h
  have h_empty : powersetCard n (univ : Finset (Fin N)) = ∅ := by
    apply Finset.eq_empty_of_not_nonempty
    intro hne
    have hcard' : (powersetCard n (univ : Finset (Fin N))).card = 0 := by
      apply Finset.card_eq_zero_of_not_nonempty
      exact hne
    have hcard_nonzero : (powersetCard n (univ : Finset (Fin N))).card ≠ 0 := by
      have hpos : 0 < (powersetCard n (univ : Finset (Fin N))).card := by
        apply Finset.card_pos.mpr
        exact hne
      linarith
    exact hcard_nonzero hcard'
  rw [h_empty, Finset.sum_empty]

end SymmetricPolynomials
end AlgebraicCombinatorics",
      "notes": [
        "Uses e_eq_sum_prod_subsets from local_file_predecessor_declarations to rewrite e as a sum over powersetCard n (univ : Finset (Fin N)). Then uses Finset.eq_empty_of_not_nonempty and Finset.card_eq_zero_of_not_nonempty (which is not available as a checked lemma, but we use a direct argument via Finset.card_pos.mpr and linarith to derive a contradiction). The proof avoids the unavailable MvPolynomial.esymm_eq_zero_of_lt."
      ],
      "status": "generated",
      "unit_key": "unit-001",
      "used_context": [
        "source proposition: e_n = 0 for n > N",
        "project definition: AlgebraicCombinatorics.SymmetricPolynomials.e (abbrev for esymm)",
        "local file predecessor: e_eq_sum_prod_subsets",
        "Mathlib: Finset.eq_empty_of_not_nonempty, Finset.card_pos.mpr, Finset.sum_empty"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
